task_completion.description: Update the Sales Stage of the specified Potential to 'Closed Lost'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Potential record titled 'Apex Corp - Q3 Hardware Restock' in Vtiger CRM. The 'Sales Stage' field should be set to 'Closed Lost'.

task_completion.description: Add a note in the Description field explaining the deal was lost to a competitor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Description' field of the 'Apex Corp - Q3 Hardware Restock' Potential. It should contain text explicitly mentioning that the deal was lost to a competitor.

task_completion.description: Upload the competitor pricing PDF as a Document linked to the Potential.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Document titled 'Competitor Pricing - Apex' in the related Documents list of the Potential, or a file upload confirmation showing the file 'competitor_pricing_apex.pdf' was attached.

task_completion.description: Create a linked To Do task with the correct subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a new To Do / Activity linked to the Potential. The subject of this task must be exactly 'Follow up - Competitor Contract expiration'.

task_completion.description: Set the linked To Do task status to 'Not Started' and due date to '2026-09-09'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the details of the created To Do task. The 'Status' field must show 'Not Started' and the 'Due Date' field must show '2026-09-09'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Vtiger CRM web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the Vtiger CRM UI. The agent should not use terminal commands (like mysql or php) to directly modify the database.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely interacted with the CRM forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of form filling, clicking 'Save' buttons, and CRM success messages rather than inspecting elements or editing local HTML.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually uploaded the requested file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the system file picker dialog or browser file input interacting with the path '/home/ga/Documents/competitor_pricing_apex.pdf'.
